creator: konrad.rybacki@wp.pl
text:
Kernel crashes after killing kdm or kdeinit (for example when logging out
of kde or sutting down the system). This problem appears only when kdm was
invoked from /etc/ttys. When kdm is invoked from command line, everything
seems to be ok. 

dmesg:

How-To-Repeat: Set up kdm in /etc/ttys. In kde (or kdm greet menu) try to logout, shutdown
or reboot the system.
